global_description: A small, slender bird with a curved, slender beak. Its plumage is predominantly brown with streaks of white and black, providing a camouflaged appearance against tree bark. The bird has a long, stiff tail and short wings.

part_details.beak: Thin, curved, and pointed, ideal for probing bark.
part_details.plumage: Brown with white and black streaks, providing camouflage.
part_details.tail: Long and stiff, used for support against tree trunks.
part_details.wings: Short and rounded, aiding in quick, agile movements.

spatial_relations: The curved beak extends from the front of the head.
The long tail is positioned at the rear, aiding in balance.
The short wings are attached to the sides of the body.
